result_json.message: We don't have any datasets related to weather, heat index, or temperature trends in Austin (or anywhere else). Our Austin-related datasets focus on topics like construction permits, health inspections, 311 calls, code complaints, crime reports, and crash data. If you're looking for heat index data, you might want to check with weather-focused sources like NOAA or local meteorological services.
